'''Lom''' was a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] working for [[Vrath Xizor]] in [[3653 BBY]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], he participated in a [[Skirmish in the Yinta Lake spaceport|skirmish]] on [[Vulta]] involving Xizor's quarry, the [[Spice/Legends|spice]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Zeerid Korr]]. Korr escaped Lom and the rest of Xizor's team with the assistance of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Aryn Leneer]], after killing multiple members of the team. Lom and the rest of the survivors were picked up by the group's speeder. Lom was frustrated that they had failed to stop Korr, and the team were told by Xizor to rendezvous on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] in three days.

==Appearances==
